entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species being evaluated for waterlogging tolerance

entities.name: WATERLOGGING
entities.description: The stress condition of excessive water saturation in the soil

entities.name: WATERLOGGING TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea genotypes to survive and grow under waterlogging stress

entities.name: SURVIVAL RATE
entities.description: The percentage of plants that survive waterlogging treatment, used as a measure of tolerance

entities.name: MAHALANOBIS D2 CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group genotypes based on their survival performance

entities.name: POT SCREENING
entities.description: The process of assessing plant survival in a controlled pot environment

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of assessing plant survival in a natural field environment

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMS
entities.description: Breeding programs used to develop new genotypes by crossing tolerant donor parents

entities.name: GERMPLASM POOL
entities.description: A collection of genetic resources consisting of various pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors that influence the performance and survival rate of genotypes
